title: Commodore 64 Ultimate (FPGA)
body:
# Commodore 64 Ultimate (FPGA)

**Platform stack:** `c64_ultimate_fpga` · **Era:** 2025–2026 · **Vendor:** Commodore International Corporation · **Count:** 4

**C64U / C64CU** — AMD Xilinx **Artix-7** FPGA, cycle-accurate recreation. Pairs with Grok16 on the host; **g16 does not run on classic 6510 silicon**.

## Stack doctrine

This page lists every combinatorics leaf stamped `platform_stack: c64_ultimate_fpga` plus companion dies emitted from `field-cpu-companion-seed.json`. Host and guest CPUs matching the stack's `match` rules receive `always_with` linkage at combinatorics build — no manual wiring.

## Manufacturing notes — companion dies

- **C64 Ultimate FPGA core** (Commodore, 32-bit) — AMD Xilinx Artix-7 — cycle-accurate 6510/SID/VIC/CIA
- **C64 Ultimate HDMI bridge** (Commodore, 32-bit) — 1080p HDMI output — PAL/NTSC
- **C64 Ultimate SID sockets** (Commodore, 8-bit) — Dual 6581/8580 sockets + 8 FPGA SIDs

## Catalog ids

The `chip_ids` array holds all **4** entries for this platform stack, sorted alphabetically. Run `field-ironclad-chips-combinatorics.py combinatronic` for path percents and imprint renders.

*Stack: c64_ultimate_fpga · seed: data/field-cpu-companion-seed.json · citation: ironclad:chips:3*
